__fixture__.name: onboarding_state_bundle
__fixture__.scenario: Top-level aggregator binding every seeded onboarding state row (tour progress, welcome-banner dismissal, session-only restore-card dismissal, first-useful-edit milestone, imported-profile history entry, rollback reminder, remembered compatibility notice, managed-policy consent acknowledgement) and declaring all twelve const-true invariants required by §6.2.

invariants.notes: Every seeded record declares exactly one storage_lane; no row is dual-homed across portable_profile_body and machine_local_state.
Every seeded row's storage_lane ↔ state_authority_class pair matches onboarding_state_contract.md §3.1 rule 2.
Every seeded row's storage_lane ↔ state_portability_class pair matches onboarding_state_contract.md §3.1 rule 3.
The first-useful-edit milestone rides machine_local_state; no milestone is written into workspace_tree.
The remembered compatibility notice carries only an equivalence-map ref and a redacted source-schema-version label; no live credential handle or approval ticket ref.
The imported-profile history entry rides portable_profile_body; no history row is minted on workspace_tree, policy_bundle_cache, or credential_store_metadata_only.
The session-only restore-card dismissal declares support_export_posture = excluded_always and remembered_across_restart = false.
The managed-policy consent-acknowledgement row declares state_authority_class = admin_or_control_artifact with delete_posture = clear_denied_admin_owned.
No seeded row exposes a raw credential handle; connected-provider approval tickets would ride credential_store_metadata_only with support_export_posture = excluded_always when present.
Every seeded row declares non-null delete_posture, support_export_posture, and hold_posture.
The dismiss_for_this_session restore-card row pairs per_session scope with ephemeral_session_memory lane and on_restart reappears rule.
The seeded rollback reminder declares rollback_window_closes_monotonic and reminder_state = armed so the reviewer sees the close horizon.

presentation_label: Onboarding state bundle — account-free / managed / migrated / device-switch cases
